title: Task Scheduler
input_format: An array of characters `tasks` representing CPU tasks and an integer `n` representing the cooldown period.
output_format: The minimum number of intervals required to complete all tasks.
constraints:
- `1 <= task.length <= 10^4`
- `tasks[i]` is upper-case English letter.
- `0 <= n <= 100`
function_signature: function leastInterval(tasks: string[], n: number): number {}
